title: Resume
text: Download my Resume as a PDF

title: Resume
text:
Education
Brigham Young University - Idaho | Rexburg, ID Bachelor of Science | November 2024 - May 2028

Major: Accounting


Minor: Data Science


GPA: 3.86

title: Resume
text:
Experience
Grocery Clerk | WinCo Foods, Idaho Falls, ID

• Promoted within two weeks for strong performance and rapid skill development.


• Provided exceptional member-focused customer service to 50+ customers per day.


• Received weekly one-on-one mentoring on branch-style operations.


• Built strong relationships with customers and coworkers.


• Recorded inventory and rotated products with high attention to detail.


• Trained across eight departments (Grocery, Produce, Meat, Bakery, Cashier).


• Supported high-traffic holiday and weekend operations.
Fryer | Rusty Lantern Diner, Ucon, ID


• Memorized 20+ recipes for main dishes and desserts.


• Prepared dozens of orders per hour in a fast-paced kitchen.


• Filled shifts during short-staffed periods with flexible availability.


• Adapted quickly to changing service demands.


• Executed food preparation and sanitation within a four-person team.

title: Resume
text:
Leadership, Interests, & Skills

• Eagle Scout Award: Earned in the final year offered by the Church.


• Service: Built and donated a bookshelf and 100 books to Ruth House.


• Awards: Received the President’s Award for Educational Achievement.


• Communication: Strong written and verbal skills; active listening.


• Interests: Played guitar for a decade; built an electric guitar from scratch.


• Work Ethic: Proven reliability during long shifts and outdoor winter conditions.


• Technical Skills: Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook) and Data Science.
